title: Sogeking Joins the Rescue
description: Usopp returns in the persona of Sogeking, joining the mission to save Robin while hiding his own pain from the crew.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, World Government agent, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Usopp returns in the persona of Sogeking, joining the mission to save Robin while hiding his own pain from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, guys, have a look at this.

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: This's what enies lobby looks like.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And just focus on the CPP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, guys, come take a look...

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: At the sky behind enies lobby!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I don't know how they do it...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, aren't you two in our group?

summary: Usopp returns in the persona of Sogeking, joining the mission to save Robin while hiding his own pain from the crew.
